titleStmt.title: SII 31.165A: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 165A. (A.R. No. B 243 of 1936.) ĒLŪRPĀḌU, BHIMAVARAM TALUK, WEST GODAVARI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On Nandi-pillar set up in front of the Bhīmēśvara temple.
It is dated in Śaka 1057 (nag-ēndriyakh-ēmdu) corresponding to 1135 A.D.

States that Bhujabalabhīma Kāṭamanāyaka exempted the Brahmins, the ascetics, their women, cattle and other things belonging to them from tolls, that are to be collected at Ēṅḍapi rēvu and further states that he set up a nandi-pillar probably contains this inscription in front of the temple of Mahādēva on the bank of the river.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . sarasīpurēti jagatiprakhyāta
mastyuttamaṁ vēṁgīmaṇḍala maṇḍanaṁ pṛ
dhusaraḥ pūrasyamadhyēpuraṁ . kallōlai
¨rvsilassatsarōjarajaḥ puṁjaissamulai
¨rjalai¨rllōlaiḥ prāṁcita sālamūlava
layaṁ lakṣmīvilāsālayaṁ . tasyaśrī
bhujabala bhīmamaṇḍalēśō vīrabhadra
dhipatirū¨rjjitōrukī¨rttivīraśrīvi
vidha vilāsa vāsa bhūmisnē¨r(snī)jijōni
yamita vāgatipragalbhaḥ yō

dha¨rmmēdha¨rmmaputrapratinidhiravanītrāṇa
nēkā¨rttavī¨ryyapāyaśśā¨ryyōbhimanyu
spuṭa mahimarucātulya Ēvapra
tāpējaudā¨ryyaka¨rnnakalpasmara Ivada
puṣikṣmāsadṛkṣaḥ kṣamāyāṁ sau
janyēmēna lōkē kadhamapi sadṛśō
vikramādityaĒva . yatkī¨rtyādhapa
līkṛtē tribhuvana cakrāyudhō vāri
dhīn kṣīrābdhinmanulē tadhāpaśupa
tiḥ kailāsaśailāngirin haṁsānē

vavihaṁgamānapi śatānaṁ
gaṇōgaṁggā ssa¨rvvana
papatiśairāvaṇaun vāra
duṣāṁ bahavōgrāmā
hamyāṇi jalapariṣu
dēśēdēśē vini¨rmmitāyēna .
kāṭamanāyaka śakasaṁvatsarē . nagēṁdriya
khēṁdu mahan viprāṇāṁca tapa
tadubhayastriṇāṁ tadaiṣāṁga
stūnāsu samyage ṇdasi na
lkannivā¨ryyāyugātpratyaṣṭhau
¨rṣabha śilāstaṁbhaṁ jayastaṁbhaṁ
yēdha¨rmmayēnaṁ paripālayaṁti
ṁtu tēpuṇyaphalaṁkratūnāṁ
viṣnuṁ tyati pāpinantēgō
haṁ tu¨rdduritaṁ prayāṁtu .

svasti [.] śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1057 gu nēṁḍu bhujabalabhīma kāṭamanāyakuṁḍu brāhmaṇulakuṁ dapasyulaku vīrala strīlaku
vīralapasulaku modalugāṁgala samastavastuvulaku veṁḍapiṟēvuna suṁkamā caṁdākkamugā nuḍipiṁci yā
yēṭikaṟti mahādēvara muṁdaṭa naṁditōḍi ṟākaṁbamu nilupe nīdha¨rmmuvu nseṟi
sinavāṇḍu paṁcamahāpātakuṇḍi
Digital edition of SII 31.165A by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
